name: spiffy-mcp
description: MCP server for the Spiffy API (part of the spiffy Claude Code plugin)

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run bundle
scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire as __createRequire } from 'module'; const require = __createRequire(import.meta.url);"
